parameters.subject: We got your intake — here's what's next
parameters.message:
=

Hi Steven,

Got it — thanks for filling that out. The 2-week build clock starts now.

Here's what happens from here:

  • This week: I'll start the SEO research, content rewrites, and the first few pages of your new site.
  • End of week 1: I'll text you to schedule a quick draft-review call — you'll see your homepage and a couple of service pages.
  • Week 2: Remaining pages, lead forms, the chat agent, GBP integration, and A2P registration kicked off in parallel.
  • Week 3: Domain cutover, training session, launch live.

If anything changes on your end between now and launch — new tech hired, new financing partner, anything — just text me. We can update as we go.

Talk soon,
Shayne
Marketing Remix
📞 (719) 357-9633
✉ shayne@shaynechamplin.com
